summary: Markets exhibit caution amid recent crypto declines and safe-haven flows into gold, with Bitcoin and Ethereum facing bearish pressure from February's sharp drops and ongoing ETF outflows. Commodities like gold show bullish resilience as a protective asset during geopolitical tensions. Limited fresh commentary today points to neutral short-term sentiment pending further catalysts.
